text:
Hey there! 👋 Welcome to the **HERB Business Assistant**.

I'm your go-to analyst for everything across the organization. Here's a quick snapshot of what I can help you with:

| Area | Coverage |
|------|----------|
| 👥 **Employees** | 530 staff across 5 departments |
| 🤝 **Customers** | 120 accounts across 4 regions & 3 tiers |
| 📦 **Products** | 30 products (platform, add-ons, services) |
| 📚 **Knowledge Base** | 20 internal Q&A on policies & processes |

**Some things you can ask me:**
- *"Who are our top customers by revenue?"*
- *"Show me a headcount breakdown by department"*
- *"Which customers are at churn risk?"*
- *"What's our refund policy?"*

What can I help you with today?
